title: Group Conversations
drDigitalIntro:
A group chat sends a message to several people at once.
• Click compose and add multiple contacts.
• Everyone in the group sees the replies.
• Great for events, family, and plans. You can add or remove people anytime.

playgroundTask.goal: You started a new conversation with Jordan

steps.say: Click on Jordan to open a different conversation.

drDigitalSuccess: Nice! You can have separate conversations with different people — each one stays in its own thread.
drDigitalHint: Click Jordan in the contacts panel on the left, type anything in the message box, and press Enter or Send.
